word: H3818 - לֹא עַמִּי - Lôʼ ʻAmmîy - lo am-mee' - Lo-ammi

sections.paragraph:
Original: לא עמּי

Transliteration: lô' ‛ammı̂y

Phonetic: lo am-mee'

BDB Definition:

Lo-ammi = "not my people"
  1. symbolic name given by the prophet Hosea to his second son by Gomer

Origin: from H3808 and H5971 with pronominal suffix

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
